# log-archive-bucket

Reusable Terraform module: `log-archive-bucket`.

> **This README is regenerated by terraform-docs in CI on every push to main.**

## Usage

```hcl

  source = "../../modules/log-archive-bucket"
  # See variables.tf for required inputs.
}
```
